user.title: Connect to MakerSpaceAPI
user.description:
Enter the base URL and a device API token for your MakerSpaceAPI instance.

The token is used to fetch rental item status and booking target balances; products are fetched without authentication.

data_description.token: Bearer token from the machine registration page

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the API. Check the URL and your network, then try again.

abort.already_configured: This MakerSpaceAPI instance is already configured.
